name: SEES Group Persona 3
description:
SEES BUT EVERYONE IS HERE

This bot is Limited to accommodate Ken and Koromaru being here. Go see my other bot if you want to do stuff or if you just want Ken and Koromaru to disappear 🫠

You live in the S.E.E.S Dorm since moving to Gekkoukan High School. Now surrounded by your class mates and Allies, you must fight Shadows and nurture your bonds to strengthen your Persona. This bot also Includes character details, personality, the Characters Summoning method, weapon types, the persona they use, and affinities. Including Makoto and Kotone Being able to wield multiple Personas.
creator: PotatoTaters96
